summary: Unified Fleet GPS Page (LIVE + HISTORIQUE) - Complete testing of merged FleetGeolocation page. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend E2E tests passed for LIVE mode, HISTORIQUE mode, mode toggle, replay controls, stats panel, and navigation flows. The /fleet/gps-history route correctly returns 404. 'Historique GPS' removed from sidebar.

issues: Console warning about HTML nesting (span inside select/option) - React dev tools injection, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing real GPS data from Teltonika hardware.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Fleet GPS page fully functional. FleetGeolocation.js now contains both LIVE and HISTORIQUE modes in a single page with mode toggle. The separate /fleet/gps-history route was removed and returns 404. 'Historique GPS' link removed from sidebar. Vehicle status logic shows 'A l arret' (amber) when GPS is stale but ignition is off, instead of 'Hors ligne' (red). Backend APIs unchanged: GET /api/fleet/gps/history/{imei}, GET /api/fleet/gps/history-days/{imei}, GET /api/fleet/gps/devices. WebSocket /api/fleet/gps/ws still works for live tracking. Real data available for dates 2026-03-22 (1093 positions, 74.8km) and 2026-03-23 (360 positions, 9.8km).

frontend_unified_page: LIVE mode is default on page load ✓
LIVE mode: WebSocket connection for real-time updates ✓
LIVE mode: Vehicle list with search and filters ✓
LIVE mode: Map with car markers ✓
LIVE mode: Vehicle detail panel with 'Voir l'historique' button ✓
HISTORIQUE mode: Route polyline with speed coloring (green <50, amber 50-90, red >90 km/h) ✓
HISTORIQUE mode: Start marker (green dot) and end marker (red dot) ✓
HISTORIQUE mode: Blue car marker for replay position ✓
HISTORIQUE mode: Stats panel (distance, duration, max/avg speed, position count) ✓
HISTORIQUE mode: Replay controls (play/pause, skip, timeline slider, speed 1x-50x) ✓
Back arrow button (←) returns to LIVE mode ✓
'Voir l'historique' button switches to HISTORIQUE mode for selected vehicle ✓
Vehicle status shows 'A l arret' (amber) when ignition off but GPS stale ✓

vehicle_status_logic.offline_hors_ligne: age > 3600s when ignition off, or age > 600s otherwise (red)
